concept.description: Labels all scanned Java packages, classes, methods, and files for global dependency tracking mapping boundaries.
concept.cypher: MATCH (t:Type) SET t:Class:Java WITH t MATCH (t)-[:DECLARES]->(m:Method) SET m:Method:Java RETURN count(t) AS EnrichedNodesCount

concept.description: Binds structural Type definitions directly to their corresponding File path nodes in the database network topology.
concept.cypher: MATCH (f:File) WHERE f.name ENDS WITH '.java' WITH f MATCH (t:Type) WHERE t.fqn CONTAINS f.name MERGE (f)-[:CONTAINS]->(t) RETURN count(t) AS LinkedSourceFilesCount
